name: Chili Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all seasoning sauce ingredients in a bowl and stir to dissolve the cornstarch.
2. Devein the shrimp without shelling them; alternatively, purchase pre-deveined shrimp.
3. Heat a wok over high heat until hot. Add 2 1/2 tablespoons of oil and heat until not smoking.
4. Add the shrimp and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until almost cooked. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. Heat a pan over high heat, add 2 tablespoons of oil, and stir-fry onions, ginger, and garlic for 30 seconds.
6. Stir in the seasoning sauce and add it to the wok with the shrimp. Stir until slightly thickened.
7. Add the shrimp back into the wok and stir until evenly coated.
8. Turn off the heat and add sesame oil, swirling to combine.
9. Serve over rice and smoked bean sprouts.
